channel.title: Fedora on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Fedora on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: Fixing Linux command permissions
item.description: Some often used commands don’t work out-of-the-box with an unprivileged user. This page will explain how to get around.

item.title: GNOME Boxes
item.description: Boxes is the built-in virtual machine manager included with the GNOME desktop environment. As it’s there, let’s give it a try !
